title: KandyToys Squidgy Axolotl | Fidget Toys | Anti Stress Ball | Stress Relief Toys
description: Experience the ultimate sensory satisfaction with Axolotl Squidgy. This unique toy allows you to squeeze and squidge to your heart's content, providing endless tactile stimulation and relaxation. Made with high-quality materials, Axolotl Squidgy is a must-have for any sensory seeker.
